title: Stoneveil
description: Grumblos is love, Grumblos is life
body:
![Title ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d84abcd54169d85825b9ccd9c79b8e4cd6afbfb3.png)

- [ Stoneveil is a mod that adds a new mob and the gargoyle block ]-
 

Grumblos are mysterious creatures that appear when lightning strikes a Grumblo Gargoyle. They like to scare mobs in packs, sit on them, and kill silverfish. You can use them to scare mobs away.



Grumblos are afraid of pickaxes. You can convert it into a pocket Grumblo for easy transport.



You can edit these options with catalog and configured.
Grumblo:

 ![Grumblo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1800581cb49a72d7639a0ccd17db1fce77c631db.png)

Gargoyles are decorative blocks with gravity; some designs are activated by redstone.

![Gargoyles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23f8b4ddef9d0909d3f25dc25ace3e69f6c6e7fa.png)

Variants to complement the stone brick building set, such as tiles and pillars.

![Stone_Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f97fe44a79777eddbbb29fc1f6d82e09355954e.png)

Discord Server: https://discord.gg/n6e9QpS9m2
